name: Link
description: An interactive reference to a resource that navigates the user to a target when activated.

keyboard_interactions.action: Executes the link and navigates to the target

roles.element: element containing link text or graphic
roles.description: Identifies the element as a link (not needed on native <a>)

required_attributes.description: Computed from text content, aria-labelledby, or aria-label

optional_attributes.description: Set to 0 to include in tab sequence

notes: Always prefer native <a href='...'> over role='link'
Links navigate; buttons perform actions — do not confuse the two
If using a non-anchor element, add tabindex='0' and handle Enter key
